name: NeuroVault
description: A web-based repository for collecting and sharing unthresholded statistical maps, parcellations, and atlases of the human brain. It enables meta-analysis, image-based decoding, and reuse of group-level results from thousands of studies, including many social-cognition and emotion paradigms — a key resource for cumulative social neuroscience.
citation: Gorgolewski KJ, Varoquaux G, Rivera G, et al. (2015). NeuroVault.org: a web-based repository for collecting and sharing unthresholded statistical maps of the human brain. Frontiers in Neuroinformatics, 9, 8.

publications.title: NeuroVault.org: a web-based repository for collecting and sharing unthresholded statistical maps of the human brain
